items.title: Drift sends onchain message to wallets tied to $280M exploit
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $280 million exploit raises concerns about security in the Solana ecosystem, potentially impacting user trust and liquidity.

items.title: Solana – Is ‘liquidity’ the real FOMO signal for SOL this cycle?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Increased liquidity could signal heightened interest in SOL, influencing market dynamics and ecosystem growth during this cycle.

items.title: Circle under fire after $285 million Drift hack over inaction to freeze stolen USDC
items.whyYouShouldCare: Circle's delayed response to the Drift hack may affect confidence in USDC's stability, which could ripple through the Solana network.
